Agents


                

                    
                    

                        

                            Director Mode Experimental
                            Each character deliberates privately. A Director then
                                resolves all intents into a single scene.
                        

                        
                    


                    
                    

                        

                            Enable AI Analysis
                            Auto-detects emotions and location changes. Disabling
                                saves tokens.
                        

                        
                    


                    
                    

                        

                            Auto-Knowledge Agent
                            Automatically creates and updates static
                                knowledge.
                        

                        
                    


                    
                    

                        

                            Character Stats
                            AI tracks and updates RPG-style stats for each
                                character.
                        

                        
                    


                    
                    

                        

                            Living Persona
                            AI periodically evolves a character's personality based
                                on history.
                        

                        
                    


                    
                    

                        

                            Response Options (CYOA)
                            Generate 4 suggested actions after AI follows.
                        

                        
                    


                    
                    

                        

                            Enable Journal & Inventory
                            Appends active quests and inventory items to the AI context.
                        

                        
                    


                

            


            
            

                
Generation

                

                    

                        
                        

                            
                            

                                
                            

                        

                    


                    

                        
                        

                            
                            

                                
                            

                        

                    

                

            


            

                
Masters & Logic


                

                    
                    

                        

                            
                            
                            
Probability of injecting plot twists.

                        

                        

                            
                            
                            
Probability of generating scene visuals.

                        

                    


                    
                    

                        
                        
                        
Select a template to edit.

                        
                    

                

            





        

        

            

                
                

                    
                    

                        
Global App Defaults

                        
These settings and prompt templates act as the
                            foundational baseline. They apply automatically to all stories unless overridden locally in
                            a story's specific Prompts tab.

                    

                


                
                

                    
Agents


                    

                        
                        

                            

                                Director Mode Experimental
                                Each character deliberates privately. A Director
                                    then resolves all intents into a single scene.
                            

                            
                        


                        
                        

                            

                                Enable AI Analysis
                                Auto-detects emotions and location changes.
                                    Disabling saves tokens.
                            

                            
                        


                        
                        

                            

                                Auto-Knowledge Agent
                                Automatically creates and updates static
                                    knowledge.
                            

                            
                        


                        
                        

                            

                                Character Stats
                                AI tracks and updates RPG-style stats for each
                                    character.
                            

                            
                        


                        
                        

                            

                                Living Persona
                                AI periodically evolves a character's personality
                                    based on history.
                            

                            
                        


                        
                        

                            

                                Response Options (CYOA)
                                Generate 4 suggested actions after AI
                                    follows.
                            

                            
                        


                        
                        

                            

                                Enable Journal & Inventory
                                Appends active quests and inventory items to the AI context.
                            

                            
                        

                    

                


                
                

                    
Generation

                    

                        

                            
                            

                                
                                

                                    
                                

                            

                        


                        

                            
                            

                                
                                

                                    
                                

                            

                        

                    

                


                

                    
Masters & Logic


                    

                        
                        

                            

                                
                                
                                
Probability of injecting plot twists.

                            

                            

                                
                                
                                
Probability of generating scene visuals.

                            

                        


                        
                        

                            

                                
                                
                            

                            
                            
Select a template to
                                view or edit its global default.

                            
                        

                    

                

            

        

        

            

                

                    

                    

                    

                        
                    

                


                

                    
Select a persona to edit.
                    

                

            

        


        

            
Note: These
                model settings are persistent and apply globally to all stories.

                        Get Key
                        
                    
                

                
Required for text generation.

                            Get Key
                            
                        
                        
                            Browse Models
                            
                        
                    

                

                
Your key and the model name.

                            Get Key
                            
                        
                        
                            Browse Models
                            
                        
                    

                

                
Pay-per-use access to 1,000+ AI models. No subscription.

                

                

                    
                    
                    
                


                

            

            

                

                    
KoboldCPP Settings

                    
                        Get Software
                        
                    
                

                
Ensure your local server is
                    running.

LM Studio Settings

                    
                        Get Software
                        
                    
                

                
Ensure LM Studio is running
                    with a
                    model loaded. Default URL is http://localhost:1234

                

                    
                    
                

            

            

                

                    
WebLLM Settings

                    
                        Docs
                        
                    
                

                
Runs models locally in your
                    browser via WebGPU. Download may take a while initially.

                

                    
                    
                

                

                    
                    Not initialized
                

            

            

                

                    

                        
                        Text-to-Speech (TTS)
                    

                    Gemini / Cloud TTS
                

                

                    
                    

                        
                        
                        
Controls when the AI speaks. "Dialogue Only" reads spoken text in quotes.

                    


                    
                    

                        
                        

                            
                            
                        

                    


                    
                    

                        
                        
                    


                    
                    

                        

                            

                                
                                NanoGPT TTS
                            

                            
Uses NanoGPT's TTS API. Requires your NanoGPT API key configured in the AI Backend tab.

                        

                        

                            
                            
                        

                        

                            
                            
                        

                    

                

            


            

                

                    

                        
                        Background Music
                    

                    AI Music
                

                


                    
                    

                        
                        

                            
                            
                            
                            
                        

                        
AI-generated instrumental music that adapts to the current scene.

                    


                    
                    

                    
                    

                        

                            
                            Google Lyria 3 (Direct)
                        

                        
Generates 30-second instrumental clips via Google's Generative AI API. Requires a Gemini API key configured in the AI Backend tab.

                        
Model: lyria-3-clip-preview · $0.04/clip

                    


                    
                    

                        

                            

                                
                                OpenRouter
                            

                            
Route music generation through OpenRouter using your existing API key. Access Lyria 3 and other audio models without a separate Gemini key.

                        

                        

                            
                            

                                
                                
                            

                            
Uses your main OpenRouter API key.

                        

                    


                    
                    

                        

                            

                                
                                NanoGPT
                            

                            
Route music generation through NanoGPT using your existing API key. Access audio generation models at list prices with no markup.

                        

                        

                            
                            

                                
                                
                            

                            
Uses your main NanoGPT API key.

                        

                    


                    
                    

                        

                            
                            
                        

                        

                            
                            
                            
How often the music regenerates to match scene changes.
                            

                        

                    


                

            


        

        

            

                
                
            


            
            

                
                
            


            
            

                
KoboldCPP / SDAPI Settings

                

                    
                    
                    
Must expose /sdapi/v1/txt2img.

                

                

                    

                        
                        
                    

                    

                        
                        
                    

                

                

                    
                    
                

                

                    

                        
                        
                    

                    

                        
                        
                    

                

                

                    
                    
                

            


            
            

                

                    
                    
                    
Leave blank to use the main OpenRouter key.

                

                

                    
                    

                        
                        
                        
                    

                


                

            


            
            

                

                    
                    
                    
Leave blank to use the main NanoGPT key.

                

                

                    
                    

                        
                        
                        
                    

                

                

            



            

                Status: Not Checked

For PNG/BYAF exports. Defaults to first AI
                            character if
                            not selected.

                        characters,
                        and
                        settings.

Refine Alpha Mask

                    
Paint to erase background or restore original details.

Welcome to EllipsisLM

                

                    A private, highly immersive storytelling engine. To begin, we need to connect a "Brain" (AI Model)
                    to power your characters and world generation.
                

                
            


            
            

                

                    
Choose your Brain

                    
Select how you want to power the AI.

                


                

                    
                    

                        

                            

                                
                            

                            

                                
Cloud (Easy - Gemini)

                                
Recommended. Fast and smart. Uses
                                    Google's Gemini API.

                            

                        

                    


                    
                    

                        

                            

                                
                            

                            

                                
Cloud (Flexible - OpenRouter)

                                
Access 100+ models (Claude, Llama,
                                    GPT) via one key.

                            

                        

                    


                    
                    

                        

                            

                                
                            

                            

                                
Local (Private)

                                
Free and 100% private. Runs on your
                                    computer. Requires hardware.

                            

                        

                    

                


                
                

                    

                        
                        

                            
                            
                        

                        Get a free key from
                            Google AI Studio
                    

                    
                    

                        
                        
                    

                


                
                

                    

                        
                        

                            
                            
                        

                        

                            Get a key from
                                OpenRouter
                            Sign Up
                        

                    

                    
                    

                        
                        
                        
                        
Default: OpenRouter Free

                    

                


                

                    

                        
Ensure your local server (KoboldCPP or LM Studio) is
                            running on port 5001 or 1234.

                        
                    

                


                

                    
                    

                        
                        
                    

                

            


            
            

                

                    AI Painter Setup

                
EllipsisLM can automatically generate character
                    portraits and location art. How would you like to set up your AI painter?


                

                    
                    

                        

                            

                                
                            

                            

                                
Skip for now

                                
You can set this up later in settings.

                            

                        

                    


                    
                    

                        

                            

                                
                            

                            

                                
Cloud (OpenRouter)

                                
Uses your OpenRouter key for image models.

                            

                        

                    


                    
                    

                        

                            

                                
                            

                            

                                
Local (Stable Diffusion)

                                
Free, private generation via your local GPU.

                            

                        

                    

                


                
                

                    
                    
                    
                    
Default: Flux Schnell

                


                
                

                    
                    
                


                

                    
                    
                

            


            
            

                

                    
You're Ready!

                    
How would you like to start your first story?

                


                

                    

                        

                            
                        

                        

                            
Create a Blank Story

AI Story Architect

Import Character Card

                            
Load a PNG card or JSON story

                        

                        

                    

                


                
or

                
✦ Explore the
                    demo story — The Shattered Crown
